bracu_official.title: BRAC University Law Graduate Awarded Prestigious Joint Doctoral Scholarship
bracu_official.summary: A BRAC University law graduate has been awarded a prestigious joint doctoral scholarship between the University of Glasgow and the University of Sydney.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University Law Alumni Association's New Executive Committee
bracu_official.summary: The new executive committee for BRAC University’s law alumni association has taken charge for the 2026–2028 term.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University Hosts Workshops
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University hosted workshops focusing on case solving, strategic decision-making, and artificial intelligence.

bracu_official.title: Last Date of Payment for Summer 2026
bracu_official.summary: The deadline for payment for the Summer 2026 semester has been set.

bracu_official.title: Notice of Award – B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-2
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University announced a notice of award for the project B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-2.

bracu_official.title: Notice of Award – B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-1
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University issued a notice of award for the project B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-1.

bracu_official.title: Recruitment Notice
bracu_official.summary: A recruitment notice was announced by BRAC University.

bracu_official.title: LLB Final Exam Schedule: Spring 2026
bracu_official.summary: The final examination schedule for LLB students for Spring 2026 has been released.
